skills.name: 洛神

skills.name: 离间
skills.summary: 令一男性对另一男性出决斗

skills.name: 闭月
skills.summary: 结束阶段摸牌，无手牌摸两张

skills.name: 新生

skills.name: 雷击

skills.name: 鬼道

skills.name: 蛊惑
skills.summary: 扣牌当任意基本或锦囊牌，可质疑

skills.name: 享乐

skills.name: 放权

skills.name: 神速
skills.summary: 跳阶段视为出杀，至多三项

skills.name: 设变

skills.name: 八阵
skills.summary: 无防具时视为装备八卦阵

skills.name: 藏拙
skills.summary: 未用锦囊则锦囊不计手牌上限

skills.name: 火计
skills.summary: 红色牌当火攻，改展示随机手牌

skills.name: 看破
skills.summary: 黑色牌当无懈且不能被响应

skills.name: 连环
skills.summary: 梅花牌当铁索连环可多目标

skills.name: 奇谋
skills.summary: 失体力摸牌减距离增杀次

skills.name: 红颜

skills.name: 天香

skills.name: 飘零
skills.summary: 结束判定红桃可置顶或给出

skills.name: 马术

skills.name: 天义

skills.name: 酣战

skills.name: 暴虐

skills.name: 凿险

skills.name: 烈刃

skills.name: 长标

skills.name: 挑衅

skills.name: 志继

skills.name: 帷幕

skills.name: 乱武
skills.summary: 令所有他人选出杀或失体力

skills.name: 好施

skills.name: 缔盟

skills.name: 巧变

skills.name: 祸首
skills.summary: 南蛮无效并代为伤害来源

skills.name: 再起

skills.name: 断肠

skills.name: 悲歌

skills.name: 驱虎

skills.name: 旋风

skills.name: 智迟

skills.name: 明策

skills.name: 将驰

skills.name: 纵适

skills.name: 巧说

skills.name: 纵玄

skills.name: 直言

skills.name: 陷阵

skills.name: 醇醪
skills.summary: 弃杀存醇，濒死当酒用

skills.name: 绝情

skills.name: 伤逝

skills.name: 翦灭

skills.name: 献州
skills.summary: 装备给他人换回血或造伤

skills.name: 窃听

skills.name: 称象

skills.name: 甘露

skills.name: 补益
skills.summary: 濒死者弃非基本牌回血

skills.name: 灭计
skills.summary: 锦囊置顶令他人弃牌

skills.summary: 依次令他人弃牌或受火伤

skills.name: 绝策
skills.summary: 结束对少牌角色造伤

skills.name: 惴恐

skills.name: 求援
skills.summary: 成目标令他人代受或给牌

skills.name: 弓骑
skills.summary: 弃牌使攻击无限同色杀无次数

skills.summary: 令他人弃武器或令角色摸牌

skills.name: 落英

skills.name: 酒诗
skills.summary: 翻面视为用酒，背面落英增强

skills.name: 技能

skills.name: 技能
skills.summary: 濒死回血摸牌至势力数

skills.name: 贞烈
skills.summary: 成目标失体力令牌无效并获益

skills.name: 秘计
skills.summary: 结束按已损体力摸牌分发

skills.name: 精策

skills.name: 马术
skills.summary: 与其他角色距离-1

skills.name: 渐营

skills.name: 毅重

skills.name: 樵拾

skills.summary: 看他人手牌后同类用牌摸牌
